events.name: Dink Classic
events.label: JUL 10–12
events.blurb: Our signature pickleball tournament — men's, women's & mixed doubles, skill levels 2.5–5.0+. Great prizes, food, and good vibes all weekend at Dink Club.

events.name: Mixed Moneyball
events.label: JUL 7 · 2026
events.blurb:
Dink Club Mixed Mini Moneyball Tournament! 
🔥 3.25–4.0 DUPR (Combined Max 8.0) 
💵 $60 per team 🥇 1st Place Cash Payout – Up to $360!

events.name: MLP Teams Moneyball
events.label: COMING SOON
events.blurb:
🏓 One Team. One Night. One Champion.

Gather your favorite pickleball crew and get ready for one of the most exciting events of the summer!

Join us at Dink Club on Saturday, July 25th from 5:00–11:00 PM for our MLP Pickleball/Moneyball 1-Day Tournament—an evening packed with great competition, amazing energy, and plenty of fun with friends.

featured.title: Pilates & Pickleball
featured.body: Jetset Modern Pilates × Dink Club — a morning of movement, play, and good vibes. Flow through a guided pilates session, then hit the courts for pickleball. All levels welcome, and a great way to meet new people, network, and connect with the Miami pickleball community.
details: 🕤 Check-in 9:30 AM · Class 10:00 AM · Pickleball 11:00 AM
✨ All levels welcome · bring a friend · bring your own mat
